get.description:
Check service health including database connectivity.

Returns HTTP 503 with an error detail if the database is unreachable.
Never returns 200 with a degraded payload — fail loud.

Payload único da landing /stocks — leaders/setores das tabelas locais.

Leaders e setores leem eod_prices ⋈ universe_constituents (pipeline batch
F6.2); ficam tão frescos quanto o último backfill. Os 4 ETFs de índice
também são lidos somente do banco local.
Return the local EOD price series for *ticker*.

OHLCV diário ajustado no contrato do chart interativo ({t,o,h,l,c,v}).

Resample semanal/mensal é client-side (engine). t = epoch ms UTC do pregão.

get.description:
Adjusted daily OHLC + volume in Highcharts Stock arrays.

Every range reads the same DB-first daily CAGG; the range only changes the
date floor. Historical ingestion is outside the request path.

Render-ready analysis payload for one ticker — single call, no frontend finance.

The visible range ends at the last trading day available for the ticker;
rolling series are warmed up on a pre-range pad and sliced back to the
visible range. All fractional fields are decimal fractions (0.05 = 5%).

parameters.name: range

schema.description: Visible-range preset; MAX = full available history.
schema.title: Range

parameters.description: Visible-range preset; MAX = full available history.

get.description:
Full 13F institutional holder list for one stock (latest period).

Resolves ticker → CUSIP and returns every filer in the >$5bn universe that
holds it — no curated filter, no row cap. `position_return` is reserved for
a later step (needs prior-period history) and is null for now.

Registered funds (N-PORT) holding the stock, grouped family → fund.

The "by fund" view of the Holders tab: a registrant/trust parent with its
funds as children (shares, market value, % of NAV). Names come from the SEC
series-class crosswalk. Latest N-PORT period.

Per-ticker news, newest first — DB-first with a declared degrade path.

Degrade decision (deliberate, documented): news is a SECONDARY panel.  If
the Tiingo refresh fails but the DB holds cached articles, serve them with
``stale=true`` and log the error — a declared degradation, NOT a silent
fallback.  If the refresh fails and the cache is empty, fail loud with the
usual 503/502 mapping.

Unknown tickers do not 404 here: Tiingo's news feed has no per-ticker
existence check, and "no news" is a legitimate ``count=0`` response.  The
ticker format is sanity-checked (alphanumeric + ".-", at most 10 chars)
to reject absurd path segments with 422.

post.description:
Render-ready analysis payload for an ad-hoc portfolio — single call.

Buy-and-hold replay (NAV, returns-based stats, benchmark comparison) plus
covariance decomposition (risk contributions, diversification ratio,
correlation matrix) — see ``app.analytics.portfolio`` for the two-views
semantics. All fractional fields are decimal fractions (0.05 = 5%).

get.description: List portfolios (id order), hard-capped at the service's LIST_HARD_CAP.

post.description:
Create a portfolio with optional initial positions.

Position tickers must already exist in local EOD/fund coverage. Missing
coverage fails loud before anything is persisted.

get.description: One portfolio with its positions (sorted by ticker).

delete.description: Delete a portfolio; its positions cascade away at the DB level.

put.description:
Upsert one position.

INSERT path validates that the ticker already has local EOD/fund coverage;
the UPDATE path deliberately does not re-check coverage — the ticker was
already accepted when the position was created.

F8.6b: the body optionally carries basis/commission/trade_date (manual
fill registration). Fields absent from the body keep the stored values
on UPDATE; on INSERT basis defaults to 'reference'.

delete.description: Delete one position; 404 covers both a missing portfolio and a missing ticker.

get.description: List immutable buy/sell ledger events for a portfolio.

schema.title: Response List Portfolio Transactions Portfolios  Portfolio Id  Transactions Get

post.description: Append a real buy/sell event and update the current position snapshot.

get.description: Persisted transaction-aware NAV index, rebased to 100 at inception.

Render-ready position table with P&L and column-header aggregates (D6).

Baseline prices come from the two most recent local eod_prices rows per
traded ticker, or fund NAV rows for NAV-priced holdings. The payload also
marks positions that may receive a frontend live-tick overlay. An empty
portfolio is a legitimate 200 with zeroed/null aggregates.

Aggregated news across all portfolio tickers, newest first.

Staleness is checked per ticker but all stale tickers are refreshed with
ONE combined Tiingo call (see ``ensure_news``).  Degrade path mirrors
GET /stocks/{ticker}/news exactly: refresh failure with cached articles
serves them with ``stale=true``; with an empty cache it fails loud.

Exposição consolidada do portfólio atravessando os fundos (Frente C).

DB-first: pesos vêm dos preços/NAVs já sincronizados localmente (sem
fetch de preço no request — posição sem preço local é 409 explícito) e as exposições
vêm das tabelas materializadas pelo worker ``nport_lookthrough`` no
data-lake. Posições não atravessadas (ações, fundos sem materialização)
ficam EXPLÍCITAS em ``unexpanded`` — nunca somem silenciosamente.

post.description:
Historical replay of a persisted portfolio over an explicit window.

Stacked value/weight/performance series plus a typed statistics rail —
render-ready in one call. All fractional fields are decimal fractions
(0.05 = 5%).
Daily-return scatter + OLS regression of two pseudo-assets (y on x).
Rolling correlation of two pseudo-assets, warm from the window start.
Pairwise correlation matrix of a portfolio's holdings (trailing window).

Upsert one filter (bounds null = unbounded; both null = metric selected).

Responds with the updated screen, the metric's universe distribution
(null when the snapshot has no data for it) and the new headline count.

delete.description: Remove one filter; same Build payload as the upsert (count updates live).

patch.description: Reorder a screen's filters; position drives the Results column order.

get.description:
Histogram of one metric over the WHOLE active universe + headline count.

The histogram ignores the screen's filters (it is the slider backdrop);
the headline count honors ALL of them. counts_normalized is 0..1 —
never pixel heights.

Every filter's universe distribution + the live headline count, one round-trip.

Feeds the Build panel's per-row sparklines and the active-row distribution
in a single request (vs. one GET /build/{metric_code} per filter).

Matching tickers with the screen's columns (filter position order).

An empty metrics snapshot is a legitimate 200 with total=0.
The same result set as /results, unpaginated, hard-capped at 5 000 rows.

One page of the fund universe with headline risk metrics.

Risk-metric bounds drop funds lacking that metric by definition.

get.description: Top holdings and sector breakdown for one fund.
Peer cohort by fund strategy/risk classification.

Exposições look-through materializadas do fundo (Frente C).

DB-first: lê a materialização do worker ``nport_lookthrough`` no
data-lake — nenhuma expansão roda aqui. 404 quando o fundo não existe no
universo local OU quando a série ainda não foi materializada (estado
explícito, nunca uma resposta vazia silenciosa).

Série do fundo no contrato do chart interativo ({t,o,h,l,c,v} + mode).

ETF com ticker → OHLCV ajustado de eod_prices (mesmo caminho dos stocks,
sem warm on-demand); demais fundos (ou ETF sem cobertura local) → NAV de
nav_timeseries com o=h=l=c=nav, v=0.

schema.description: Nº de barras diárias mais recentes.
schema.title: Bars

parameters.description: Nº de barras diárias mais recentes.

get.description:
Daily fund NAV line in Highcharts arrays.

Every range reads the same DB-first daily CAGG; the range only changes the
date floor.

post.description:
Walk-forward / out-of-sample backtest of a mu-free objective.

Re-optimizes the objective on each expanding TimeSeriesSplit train fold and
scores the held-out test fold (Sharpe, CVaR 95, max drawdown), folding in a
one-way transaction cost on the L1 weight change vs the previous fold. The
response reports per-fold metrics plus the ``positive_folds`` consistency
count. All fractional fields are decimal fractions (0.05 = 5%).

When ``use_async_jobs`` is on and ``n_splits`` is large, the computation is
enqueued as a job (HTTP 202 + job id) and served via GET /jobs/{id}; the
synchronous path (cached) is otherwise unchanged.

Optimize weights over a mixed fund/equity universe.

Default objective is ``min_cvar`` (Rockafellar–Uryasev, α=0.95) on raw
historical scenarios. With Black-Litterman ``views``, scenarios are
re-centered on the posterior μ_BL and floored at the equilibrium return;
``bl_utility`` selects the explicit max-utility objective instead;
``max_return_cvar`` maximizes BL-posterior return under a CVaR cap, which
is tightened in a risk_off credit regime when the data-lake is configured.
All fractional fields are decimal fractions (0.05 = 5%).

Persist a builder proposal as a real portfolio (F8.5 + F8.6b).

Each weight is sized at the asset's REFERENCE price (equities: latest
adj_close; funds: latest NAV) against ``notional_usd`` — unless it
carries a ``fill_price``, which sizes the position and (with the
commission) defines the real cost basis (basis='executed'). Fund weights
may select a share class via ``class_ticker`` (same instrument; priced
with the series NAV as a proxy). The portfolio is tagged
origin='builder'. Domain failures — asset without a price, fund without
a ticker, invalid class, duplicate portfolio name, weight too small for
the notional — are 422 verbatim.

get.description: Estado atual do detector vote2of3 + breakdown dos votos + explicabilidade.
Latest regional macro scorecards (composite + dimensions + freshness).
Latest global macro risk indicators (geopolitical/energy/commodity/USD).

post.description:
Correlation-regime + contagion analysis over an explicit asset list or a
resolved fund universe. Decimal-fraction scale. Domain failures → 422.

get.description: Treasury fiscal series for one category over the lookback window.

post.description:
Block-bootstrap Monte Carlo projection for one instrument — single call.

Returns the percentile distribution of the chosen statistic at the longest
horizon, a per-horizon confidence fan, and the historical value with its
bootstrap percentile rank. All drawdown/return fields are decimal fractions
(0.05 = 5%); sharpe is unitless.

Block-bootstrap Monte Carlo over a synthetic portfolio NAV.

Builds the portfolio return series from the positions' common-history
aligned returns (target weights held = implicit rebalancing) and runs the
same block-bootstrap core as the single-instrument projection. Drawdown/
return fields are decimal fractions (0.05 = 5%); sharpe is unitless.

Error mapping (fail loud):
- request shape / weight bounds / position count -> 422 (Pydantic)
- unknown asset / no history in window           -> 422
- insufficient common observations               -> 422
- history too short for the requested horizon    -> 422

When ``use_async_jobs`` is on and ``n_simulations`` is large, the run is
enqueued as a job (HTTP 202 + job id), served via GET /jobs/{id}.

get.description: Política salva do portfólio; 404 quando nenhuma foi configurada.
Avaliação on-demand: decisão + drifts + proposta + turnover (advisory).
Sugestões para o Compare: ações (universe) e fundos com ticker.

schema.title: Response Search Symbols Search Symbols Get

AbsoluteViewIn.title: AbsoluteViewIn
AbsoluteViewIn.description: 'Asset returns q per year' (e.g. q=0.12 → 12% a.a.).

initial_nav.title: Initial Nav
initial_nav.description: Sum of initial position values, in currency units.

AllocationOut.title: AllocationOut
AllocationOut.description: Resolved allocation at the first analyzed date (the replay strike point).

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: Effective initial weight as a decimal fraction (0.5 = 50%), never 0-100. For mode='weights' the (renormalized) requested weight; for mode='quantities' the initial-date value weight.

initial_value.title: Initial Value
initial_value.description: Position value at the first date, in currency units.

AllocationPosition.title: AllocationPosition
AllocationPosition.description: One position of the resolved allocation at the first date.

name.title: Name
name.description: Instrument name from Tiingo metadata, if known.

last_close.title: Last Close
last_close.description: Most recent RAW close price (currency units).

prev_close.title: Prev Close
prev_close.description: Previous trading day's RAW close price (currency units).

change.title: Change
change.description: last_close - prev_close, in currency units (not a fraction).

change_pct.title: Change Pct
change_pct.description: One-day change as a decimal fraction (0.05 = 5%), never 0-100.

AnalysisHeader.title: AnalysisHeader
AnalysisHeader.description: Render-ready header strip values (RAW, un-adjusted prices).

benchmark.title: Benchmark
benchmark.description: Benchmark ticker used for beta/correlation/relative series.

window.title: Window
window.description: Rolling window length in TRADING days.

end_date.title: End Date
end_date.description: Resolved visible-range end — the last trading day available for the ticker.

AnalysisParams.title: AnalysisParams
AnalysisParams.description: Echo of the resolved request parameters.

annualized_volatility.title: Annualized Volatility
annualized_volatility.description: Annualized volatility as a decimal fraction (0.25 = 25%), never 0-100.

var_95.title: Var 95
var_95.description: Historical 1-day VaR at 95% as a POSITIVE decimal fraction (0.02 = 5% of days lose more than 2%), never 0-100.

var_99.title: Var 99
var_99.description: Historical 1-day VaR at 99% as a POSITIVE decimal fraction, never 0-100.

cvar_95.title: Cvar 95
cvar_95.description: Historical 1-day CVaR (expected shortfall) at 95% as a POSITIVE decimal fraction, never 0-100.

total_return.title: Total Return
total_return.description: Compounded in-range total return as a decimal fraction (0.5 = +50%), never 0-100.

beta.title: Beta
beta.description: Beta vs benchmark over in-range aligned returns (unitless).

correlation.title: Correlation
correlation.description: Pearson correlation vs benchmark over in-range aligned returns (-1..1).

AnalysisStats.title: AnalysisStats
AnalysisStats.description:
Point statistics over IN-RANGE returns only (the rolling warm-up pad
is never included). Beta/correlation are versus the benchmark on the
aligned in-range date grid.

x.title: X
x.description: Label of asset_x: the ticker, or the portfolio name.

y.title: Y
y.description: Label of asset_y: the ticker, or the portfolio name.

AxisLabels.title: AxisLabels
AxisLabels.description: Display labels for the two compared pseudo-assets.

BenchmarkComparison.title: BenchmarkComparison
BenchmarkComparison.description:
Cumulative return of the portfolio vs the benchmark, rebased to 0.

Both series share the same aligned date grid and start at exactly 0.0 on
the same first date. Values are decimal fractions (0.05 = 5%), never 0-100.

BetaRequest.title: BetaRequest
BetaRequest.description: Regression of asset_y's daily returns on asset_x's over the window.

scatter.title: Scatter
scatter.description: [ret_x, ret_y] aligned daily return pairs, decimal fractions.

regression_line.title: Regression Line
regression_line.description: Two endpoints of the fitted line, y = alpha + beta * x evaluated at min(ret_x) and max(ret_x) — render-ready.

BetaResponse.title: BetaResponse
BetaResponse.description: Scatter + regression of two pseudo-assets' daily returns.

BlockBudgetIn.title: BlockBudgetIn
BlockBudgetIn.description:
Σ of weights in an asset-class block must lie in [lo, hi] (decimal
fractions). ``asset_class`` matches ``Fund.asset_class``.

BuildAllResponse.title: BuildAllResponse
BuildAllResponse.description:
GET /screener/screens/{id}/build — every filter's distribution in one round-trip.

headline_count honors ALL filters (the live match count); each metric's
distribution is the universe-wide histogram (null when the snapshot has no
data for it), feeding the per-row sparklines and the active-row panel.

headline_count.title: Headline Count
headline_count.description: Universe rows satisfying ALL the screen's current filters.

available_count.title: Available Count
available_count.description: Non-NULL rows for this metric over the active universe. Distinguishes 'zero matches' (headline_count=0, available_count>0) from 'no data yet' (available_count=0) without inspecting the 422.

Candle.title: Candle
Candle.description:
One OHLCV candle built from RAW (un-adjusted) prices.

Daily for ranges up to 5Y; weekly (W-FRI buckets: open=first, high=max,
low=min, close=last, volume=sum) for range MAX.

ConfidenceBar.title: ConfidenceBar
ConfidenceBar.description:
One horizon's percentile fan of the projected statistic.

For max_drawdown/return the percentile fields are decimal fractions
(0.05 = 5%); for sharpe they are unitless.

ConstraintsIn.title: ConstraintsIn
ConstraintsIn.description:
Long-only and sum(w)=1 are always enforced; these are the knobs.

``block_budgets`` (per-asset-class Σ-weight bounds) are honoured ONLY by the
``min_cvar`` objective in v1; they are resolved against ``Fund.asset_class``
server-side and IGNORED by the other objectives. Empty/None = no blocks.

matrix.title: Matrix
matrix.description: Row-major square matrix (-1..1); symmetric with unit diagonal.

CorrelationMatrixOut.title: CorrelationMatrixOut
CorrelationMatrixOut.description: Pairwise Pearson correlation of per-asset daily returns.

CorrelationRegimeRequest.title: CorrelationRegimeRequest
CorrelationRegimeRequest.description:
Analyze either an explicit ``assets`` list OR a ``universe`` spec
(exactly one), over the optimizer's aligned returns matrix.

window.title: Window
window.description: Rolling window length in TRADING days.

CorrelationRequest.title: CorrelationRequest
CorrelationRequest.description: Rolling correlation of two pseudo-assets' daily returns.

window.title: Window
window.description: Rolling window length in TRADING days.

CorrelationResponse.title: CorrelationResponse
CorrelationResponse.description:
Rolling-correlation series of two pseudo-assets.

Returns are warmed up on a pre-start lookback pad (the F2.2 pattern) so the
series covers the requested window from (approximately) its first trading
day; NaN warm-up rows are dropped.

CumulativeReturns.title: CumulativeReturns
CumulativeReturns.description:
Cumulative return series rebased to 0 at the first in-range date.

Asset and benchmark share the same date grid (aligned on common trading
days before slicing). Values are decimal fractions (0.05 = 5%), never
0-100; both series start at exactly 0.0 on the same first date.

value.title: Value
value.description: Portfolio value in currency units (not a fraction).

DatedNav.title: DatedNav
DatedNav.description: A single dated NAV observation, in currency units.

value.title: Value
value.description: Daily return as a decimal fraction (0.05 = 5%), never 0-100.

DistributionOut.title: DistributionOut
DistributionOut.description: Histogram over the active universe; counts_normalized in 0..1, never pixels.

depth.title: Depth
depth.description: NEGATIVE decimal fraction (-0.35 = 35% peak-to-trough loss), never 0-100.

DrawdownOut.title: DrawdownOut
DrawdownOut.description: Maximum drawdown of the in-range ADJUSTED close series.

EmptyState.title: EmptyState
EmptyState.description: Explicit reason why a real data source cannot populate a panel.

ExcludedFundOut.title: ExcludedFundOut
ExcludedFundOut.description: A fund dropped by Stage-1 with its reason (fail-loud transparency).

ExposureTreeNode.title: ExposureTreeNode
ExposureTreeNode.description: Parent-linked node for drillable portfolio exposure charts.

FilterBody.title: FilterBody

Bounds for PUT /screener/screens/{id}/filters/{metric_code}.

Both bounds null is legitimate: the metric is selected (results column,

Must list EXACTLY the screen's current filter codes, in the desired order.

available_count.title: Available Count

FilterUpdateResponse.title: FilterUpdateResponse
FilterUpdateResponse.description:
PUT/DELETE filter response — one round-trip powers the Build UI.

``distribution`` is null (rather than failing the successful write with
422) when the metric has zero non-NULL rows in the snapshot.
``available_count`` exposes the non-NULL count so the UI can distinguish

FundSourceMetadata.description: Source table and as-of information for DB-first dossier payloads.

FundStyleBias.title: FundStyleBias
FundStyleBias.description: Cross-sectional characteristic z-score for the latest available month.

FundStyleDriftPeriod.title: FundStyleDriftPeriod
FundStyleDriftPeriod.description: Sector exposure for one N-PORT report date.

FundStyleDriftResponse.title: FundStyleDriftResponse
FundStyleDriftResponse.description: Historical sector weights from N-PORT reports.

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: Sector weight as a decimal fraction (0.25 = 25%).

FundStyleSectorWeight.title: FundStyleSectorWeight
FundStyleSectorWeight.description: One sector bucket in one historical holdings period.

FundTailRiskMetrics.title: FundTailRiskMetrics
FundTailRiskMetrics.description: Tail-risk ladder using parametric and Cornish-Fisher modified VaR.

FundTopHolding.title: FundTopHolding
FundTopHolding.description: Top holding row enriched with a display sector label.

classification_note.title: Classification Note
classification_note.default: Labels da fonte podem conter erros do classificador automático

FundsStaleness.title: FundsStaleness
FundsStaleness.description: Global data-freshness markers (max over the synced universe).

GlobalIndicatorsResponse.title: GlobalIndicatorsResponse
GlobalIndicatorsResponse.description:
Global macro risk indicators (0-100). Note: polarity varies by field —
geopolitical_risk_score and energy_stress are risk measures (higher = worse),
while commodity_stress and usd_strength reflect market stress/strength.

bin_edges.title: Bin Edges
bin_edges.description: len(counts)+1 edges in daily-return units, decimal fractions (0.05 = 5%).

counts_normalized.title: Counts Normalized
counts_normalized.description: Each count divided by the maximum count (0-1), for direct bar heights.

HolderNetwork.title: HolderNetwork
HolderNetwork.description: Small network payload for institutional relationships.

HolderNetworkEdge.title: HolderNetworkEdge
HolderNetworkEdge.description: Edge for the Relationships modal holder/security network.

HolderNetworkNode.title: HolderNetworkNode
HolderNetworkNode.description: Node for the Relationships modal holder/security network.

HoldingReverseLookupResponse.title: HoldingReverseLookupResponse
HoldingReverseLookupResponse.description: Tier C reverse lookup from CUSIP to institutions and fund exposures.

sentiment_score.title: Sentiment Score
sentiment_score.description: Net/(buy+sell), bounded to [-1, 1] when volume exists.

InsiderData.title: InsiderData
InsiderData.description: Insider sentiment mapped from fund holdings to issuer CIKs.

InsiderQuarterSentiment.title: InsiderQuarterSentiment
InsiderQuarterSentiment.description: Quarterly Form 4 buy/sell aggregate for issuers held by the fund.

InstitutionalHolder.title: InstitutionalHolder
InstitutionalHolder.description: Institutional manager exposure across the fund's underlying CUSIPs.

InstitutionalOverlapSecurity.title: InstitutionalOverlapSecurity
InstitutionalOverlapSecurity.description: One fund holding with matching 13F institutional ownership.

JobEnqueuedResponse.title: JobEnqueuedResponse
JobEnqueuedResponse.description: Returned with HTTP 202 when a heavy computation is queued.

LineSeriesResponse.title: LineSeriesResponse
LineSeriesResponse.description: Single line series for Highcharts Stock: [[t_ms, value], ...].

MacroRegimeResponse.title: MacroRegimeResponse
MacroRegimeResponse.description:
Estado do detector vote2of3 (worker regime_composite) + breakdown dos votos.

risk_off ⇔ ≥2 votos entre credit/trend/nfci. Estados binários — o composite
por score ponderado (legado) foi refutado. O credit_regime segue materializado
(é 1 dos votos); o composite é o detector promovido (Sharpe 0,549 / DD 25,3%).

MacroRegionalResponse.title: MacroRegionalResponse
MacroRegionalResponse.description: Latest regional macro scorecards (worker macro_ingestion, DB-first).

MarketBreadth.title: MarketBreadth
MarketBreadth.description:
Participação do universo líquido no movimento do dia (painel /stocks).

Derivado das mesmas linhas usadas no ranking: amplitude confirma (ou não)
a direção das tabelas de leaders.

MetricBuildOut.title: MetricBuildOut
MetricBuildOut.description: One filter's distribution + availability for the batch build payload.

MetricDefOut.title: MetricDefOut
MetricDefOut.description: One catalog metric — ``code`` is the screener_metrics column name.

seed.title: Seed
seed.description: Seed used, or null when unseeded.

MonteCarloParams.title: MonteCarloParams
MonteCarloParams.description: Echo of the resolved request parameters.

statistic.title: Statistic
statistic.description: Which statistic to project: max_drawdown | return | sharpe.

range.title: Range
range.description: History window used to estimate the return distribution; MAX = full available history.

horizons.title: Horizons
horizons.description: Trading-day horizons for the confidence fan; default 1Y/3Y/5Y/7Y/10Y.

risk_free_rate.title: Risk Free Rate
risk_free_rate.description: Annualized risk-free rate for the Sharpe statistic (decimal fraction).

seed.title: Seed
seed.description: Optional RNG seed for a reproducible projection.

MonteCarloRequest.title: MonteCarloRequest
MonteCarloRequest.description: Block-bootstrap Monte Carlo projection request for one instrument.

percentiles.title: Percentiles
percentiles.description: Distribution of the statistic at the longest horizon, keyed by percentile ('1st'..'99th').

historical_value.title: Historical Value
historical_value.description: The statistic computed on the ACTUAL historical series.

historical_horizon_days.title: Historical Horizon Days
historical_horizon_days.description: Length of the historical series in trading days.

historical_percentile_rank.title: Historical Percentile Rank
historical_percentile_rank.description: Percentile rank (0-100) of the historical value within a horizon-matched bootstrap; null for the sharpe statistic.

degraded.title: Degraded
degraded.description: True only when a flat-NAV Sharpe collapse made the result uninformative.

degraded_reason.title: Degraded Reason
degraded_reason.description: Diagnostic when degraded is True, else null.

MonteCarloResponse.title: MonteCarloResponse
MonteCarloResponse.description:
Render-ready Monte Carlo projection payload.

The backend computes ALL finance; the frontend only draws. Percentiles for
max_drawdown/return are decimal fractions (0.05 = 5%); sharpe is unitless.

NewsArticle.title: NewsArticle
NewsArticle.description: One news article linked to the requested ticker.

NewsResponse.title: NewsResponse
NewsResponse.description:
News articles for one ticker, newest first.

``stale`` is True when the Tiingo refresh failed but cached articles were
served — a declared degradation, never a silent fallback.

OhlcSeriesResponse.title: OhlcSeriesResponse
OhlcSeriesResponse.description: OHLC + volume series for Highcharts Stock.

OptimizeRequest.title: OptimizeRequest
OptimizeRequest.description:
Optimize over either an explicit ``assets`` list OR a ``universe`` spec
(exactly one). ``universe`` resolves to fund candidates server-side.

total_market_value.title: Total Market Value
total_market_value.description: Sum of position market values, currency units (0 when empty).

total_cost_basis.title: Total Cost Basis
total_cost_basis.description: Sum over positions with a known acq_price; null when ALL are unknown.

total_pnl.title: Total Pnl
total_pnl.description: Sum of pnl over positions with a known acq_price; null when no position has a cost basis.

total_pnl_pct.title: Total Pnl Pct
total_pnl_pct.description: total_pnl / total_cost_basis as a decimal fraction, never 0-100; null when no position has a cost basis.

as_of.title: As Of
as_of.description: Max as_of across positions; null for an empty portfolio.

OverviewAggregates.title: OverviewAggregates
OverviewAggregates.description: Portfolio-level aggregates rendered in the table column headers (D6).

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: 'weights' = every position carries a weight; 'quantities' = share counts.

range.title: Range
range.description: Visible-range preset; MAX = full COMMON history.

benchmark.title: Benchmark
benchmark.description: Benchmark ticker for the comparison series and beta/correlation. May coincide with a position.

PortfolioAnalysisRequest.title: PortfolioAnalysisRequest
PortfolioAnalysisRequest.description: Ad-hoc portfolio definition to replay and decompose (no persistence).

nav.title: Nav
nav.description: [date, NAV] points in currency units; starts at initial_nav. Daily up to 5Y; weekly (W-FRI, last-of-week) for range MAX. Shares the same date grid as benchmark_comparison (sliced to the portfolio–benchmark aligned index) so all line series can be plotted on a single x-axis. Stats are computed on the full position-grid NAV (before the benchmark alignment slice) — they describe the portfolio, not the comparison chart.

risk_contributions.title: Risk Contributions
risk_contributions.description: Per-asset fractions of total risk; they sum to 1.

PortfolioAnalysisResponse.title: PortfolioAnalysisResponse
PortfolioAnalysisResponse.description:
Render-ready single-call payload for the static portfolio page.

Two views, two questions (see ``app.analytics.portfolio``): ``nav``,
``benchmark_comparison`` and the return-based ``stats`` are a buy-and-hold
REPLAY (fixed quantities, weights drift); ``risk_contributions`` and
``diversification_ratio`` are a covariance DECOMPOSITION at the effective
initial weights held constant. The backend computes ALL finance; the
frontend only draws. Every fractional field is a decimal fraction
(0.05 = 5%), never 0-100.

name.title: Name
name.description: Portfolio name; 1..80 characters after trimming, unique across the installation.

inception_date.title: Inception Date
inception_date.description: User-declared portfolio inception date for NAV/performance.

positions.title: Positions
positions.description: Initial positions (at most 50); tickers must be unique.

PortfolioListItem.title: PortfolioListItem
PortfolioListItem.description: One row of GET /portfolios (positions omitted, count only).

seed.title: Seed
seed.description: Seed used, or null when unseeded.

PortfolioMonteCarloParams.title: PortfolioMonteCarloParams
PortfolioMonteCarloParams.description: Echo of the resolved portfolio MC parameters (no ticker; n_assets instead).

statistic.title: Statistic
statistic.description: Which statistic to project: max_drawdown | return | sharpe.

horizons.title: Horizons
horizons.description: Trading-day horizons for the confidence fan; default 1Y/3Y/5Y/7Y/10Y.

risk_free_rate.title: Risk Free Rate
risk_free_rate.description: Annualized risk-free rate for the Sharpe statistic (decimal fraction).

seed.title: Seed
seed.description: Optional RNG seed for a reproducible projection.

PortfolioMonteCarloRequest.title: PortfolioMonteCarloRequest
PortfolioMonteCarloRequest.description:
Block-bootstrap Monte Carlo over a synthetic portfolio NAV.

The service builds ``portfolio_returns = frame @ w`` from the common-history
aligned returns of the positions (target weights held = implicit continuous
rebalancing), then runs the SAME pure ``block_bootstrap_monte_carlo`` the
single-instrument projection uses.

percentiles.title: Percentiles
percentiles.description: Distribution of the statistic at the longest horizon, keyed by percentile ('1st'..'99th').

historical_value.title: Historical Value
historical_value.description: The statistic computed on the ACTUAL synthetic portfolio series.

historical_horizon_days.title: Historical Horizon Days
historical_horizon_days.description: Length of the synthetic portfolio series in trading days.

historical_percentile_rank.title: Historical Percentile Rank
historical_percentile_rank.description: Percentile rank (0-100) of the historical value within a horizon-matched bootstrap; null for the sharpe statistic.

degraded.title: Degraded
degraded.description: True only when a flat-NAV Sharpe collapse made the result uninformative.

degraded_reason.title: Degraded Reason
degraded_reason.description: Diagnostic when degraded is True, else null.

PortfolioMonteCarloResponse.title: PortfolioMonteCarloResponse
PortfolioMonteCarloResponse.description:
Render-ready portfolio Monte Carlo payload.

Reuses the single-instrument distribution shape (``ConfidenceBar``,
percentiles, historical rank, degraded flags); only ``params`` differs
(n_assets instead of ticker/range). Drawdown/return fields are decimal
fractions (0.05 = 5%); sharpe is unitless.

PortfolioNavPoint.title: PortfolioNavPoint
PortfolioNavPoint.description:
Transaction-aware NAV index point.

``nav`` is a rebased index value, not raw dollars. ``market_value`` is the
post-trade value of open holdings on that date.

tickers.title: Tickers
tickers.description: Portfolio tickers the articles were matched on.

PortfolioNewsResponse.title: PortfolioNewsResponse
PortfolioNewsResponse.description:
Aggregated news across all portfolio tickers, newest first.

``stale`` is True when the Tiingo refresh failed but cached articles were
served — a declared degradation, never a silent fallback (same contract
as GET /stocks/{ticker}/news).

PortfolioOut.title: PortfolioOut
PortfolioOut.description: One persisted portfolio with its positions (sorted by ticker).

benchmark.title: Benchmark
benchmark.description: Benchmark ticker used for the comparison series.

start_date.title: Start Date
start_date.description: First trading day of the analyzed window (first date where ALL position tickers have data).

end_date.title: End Date
end_date.description: Last trading day of the analyzed window — the most recent date COMMON to all requested symbols (positions + benchmark). One stale symbol (a ticker whose last available EOD row lags the others) moves this date back for everyone; end = min(last_available_date per symbol).

initial_nav.title: Initial Nav
initial_nav.description: Portfolio value at start_date, in currency units. 10000 for mode='weights' (notional); the actual position value for mode='quantities'.

PortfolioParams.title: PortfolioParams
PortfolioParams.description: Echo of the resolved request parameters.

name.title: Name
name.description: New portfolio name (same rules as on create).

inception_date.title: Inception Date
inception_date.description: Portfolio inception date; null clears it.

PortfolioPatch.title: PortfolioPatch
PortfolioPatch.description: Body for PATCH /portfolios/{id} — at least one field must be present.

PortfolioPositionIn.title: PortfolioPositionIn
PortfolioPositionIn.description:
One position in a synthetic portfolio MC request.

``asset`` reuses the builder ref (FundRefIn | EquityRefIn) so the request is
the exact weight list the optimizer returned; ``weight`` is a decimal
fraction (0 < w <= 1). The service aligns weights to the loaded return
frame's columns by the 'fund:{id}' / 'equity:{TICKER}' label scheme.

PortfolioRef.title: PortfolioRef
PortfolioRef.description:
Pseudo-asset reference: a persisted portfolio.

Resolved by replaying the portfolio's CURRENT quantities over the request
window (buy-and-hold historical replay — see ``app.analytics.portfolio``).
The pseudo-asset's daily returns are the engine's ``portfolio_returns``
over the inner-joined holdings (uninvested cash is NOT part of the
pseudo-asset — it is constant and would only dilute beta/correlation).

annualized_volatility.title: Annualized Volatility
annualized_volatility.description: Annualized volatility as a decimal fraction (0.25 = 25%), never 0-100.

var_95.title: Var 95
var_95.description: Historical 1-day VaR at 95% as a POSITIVE decimal fraction (0.02 = 5% of days lose more than 2%), never 0-100.

var_99.title: Var 99
var_99.description: Historical 1-day VaR at 99% as a POSITIVE decimal fraction, never 0-100.

cvar_95.title: Cvar 95
cvar_95.description: Historical 1-day CVaR (expected shortfall) at 95% as a POSITIVE decimal fraction, never 0-100.

total_return.title: Total Return
total_return.description: Compounded total return of the replayed portfolio as a decimal fraction (0.5 = +50%), never 0-100.

beta.title: Beta
beta.description: Portfolio beta vs benchmark over aligned daily returns (unitless).

correlation.title: Correlation
correlation.description: Pearson correlation vs benchmark over aligned daily returns (-1..1).

diversification_ratio.title: Diversification Ratio
diversification_ratio.description: Weighted-average asset volatility divided by portfolio volatility at the effective initial weights; >= 1 for long-only portfolios (unitless).

sharpe_ratio.title: Sharpe Ratio
sharpe_ratio.description: Annualized Sharpe ratio of the replayed portfolio's daily returns at the canonical 4% risk-free rate (unitless).

sortino_ratio.title: Sortino Ratio
sortino_ratio.description: Annualized Sortino ratio (Target Downside Deviation denominator) at the canonical 4% risk-free rate (unitless).

information_ratio.title: Information Ratio
information_ratio.description: Annualized information ratio of the portfolio's active return vs the benchmark over the aligned daily grid (unitless).

effective_number_of_bets.title: Effective Number Of Bets
effective_number_of_bets.description: Entropy Effective Number of Bets over the per-asset risk contributions at the effective initial weights; in [1, n_positions] (unitless).

PortfolioStats.title: PortfolioStats
PortfolioStats.description:
Point statistics over the portfolio's daily returns in the analyzed
window. Beta/correlation are versus the benchmark on the aligned date
grid; the diversification ratio is evaluated at the effective initial
weights (decomposition view).

PortfolioTransactionCreate.title: PortfolioTransactionCreate
PortfolioTransactionCreate.description: One immutable buy/sell event in the portfolio ledger.

acq_price.title: Acq Price
acq_price.description: Acquisition price per share/unit; null = unknown (P&L renders null). With basis='executed' this is the effective cost basis incl. commissions.

basis.title: Basis
basis.description: 'reference' (spot/NAV for analysis) or 'executed' (real fill incl. commissions). Omitted: insert defaults to 'reference', update keeps the stored value.

commission.title: Commission
commission.description: Total commission paid on the fill, currency units (>= 0).

PositionBody.title: PositionBody
PositionBody.description:
Quantity/acquisition-price payload for the position upsert (PUT).

F8.6b fill fields are optional: omitting them keeps the pre-F8.6b
behavior (on UPDATE the stored basis/commission/trade_date are left
untouched; on INSERT basis defaults to 'reference').

acq_price.title: Acq Price
acq_price.description: Acquisition price per share/unit; null = unknown (P&L renders null). With basis='executed' this is the effective cost basis incl. commissions.

basis.title: Basis
basis.description: 'reference' (spot/NAV for analysis) or 'executed' (real fill incl. commissions). Omitted: insert defaults to 'reference', update keeps the stored value.

commission.title: Commission
commission.description: Total commission paid on the fill, currency units (>= 0).

PositionCreate.title: PositionCreate
PositionCreate.description: One position in the create-portfolio payload.

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: Target weight as a decimal fraction (0.5 = 50%), never 0-100; > 0.

PositionIn.title: PositionIn
PositionIn.description:
One requested position: a ticker plus EITHER a weight OR a quantity.

Which field is required depends on the request ``mode`` (cross-checked at
the request level): mode=weights demands ``weight``, mode=quantities
demands ``quantity``.

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name from the instruments cache.

asset_class.title: Asset Class
asset_class.description: Fund asset_class for the grouped allocation view; None for direct equities / non-fund tickers.

strategy_label.title: Strategy Label
strategy_label.description: Fund strategy_label for the grouped allocation view; None for direct equities.

instrument_id.title: Instrument Id
instrument_id.description: Fund instrument_id (for the dossier link); None for non-fund holdings.

fund_type.title: Fund Type
fund_type.description: Fund type from the fund catalog, e.g. etf/mutual_fund/mmf; None for direct stock/non-fund holdings.

price_source.title: Price Source
price_source.description: Baseline price source used for the backend overview: eod for traded closes, nav for fund NAV snapshots.

live_price_eligible.title: Live Price Eligible
live_price_eligible.description: True when the frontend may overlay real-time ticks on top of the EOD baseline. Stocks and ETFs are eligible; NAV-priced funds remain EOD.

acq_price.title: Acq Price
acq_price.description: Acquisition price per share/unit; null = unknown. With basis='executed' this is the effective cost basis incl. commissions.

basis.title: Basis
basis.description: 'reference' (spot/NAV cost basis, analysis-grade) or 'executed' (real fill incl. commissions).

commission.title: Commission
commission.description: Total commission paid on the fill, currency units; null when unknown or basis='reference'.

trade_date.title: Trade Date
trade_date.description: Execution date of the fill; null when unknown or basis='reference'.

last_close.title: Last Close
last_close.description: Most recent EOD close, currency units.

prev_close.title: Prev Close
prev_close.description: Second-most-recent EOD close; null when only one row exists.

change.title: Change
change.description: last_close - prev_close, currency units; null without prev_close.

change_pct.title: Change Pct
change_pct.description: change / prev_close as a decimal fraction (0.05 = 5%), never 0-100; null without prev_close.

cost_basis.title: Cost Basis
cost_basis.description: quantity * acq_price, currency units; null when acq_price is unknown.

pnl.title: Pnl
pnl.description: market_value - cost_basis, currency units; null when acq_price is unknown.

pnl_pct.title: Pnl Pct
pnl_pct.description: pnl / cost_basis as a decimal fraction (0.10 = 10%), never 0-100; null when acq_price is unknown.

PositionOverview.title: PositionOverview
PositionOverview.description: One render-ready overview row; the backend computes ALL finance.

PresetBandOut.title: PresetBandOut
PresetBandOut.description: One selectable filter band; null bound = unbounded on that side.

PricePoint.title: PricePoint
PricePoint.description: One EOD bar in a price series response.

PriceSeriesResponse.title: PriceSeriesResponse
PriceSeriesResponse.description: EOD price series for one ticker over [start_date, end_date].

ProposalOut.title: ProposalOut
ProposalOut.description: Proposta advisory — NUNCA é executada automaticamente.

RegimeSignalOut.title: RegimeSignalOut
RegimeSignalOut.description: Proveniência/explicabilidade do voto de crédito + valor do NFCI.

RegimeVotesOut.title: RegimeVotesOut
RegimeVotesOut.description: Breakdown dos 3 votos do ensemble (explicabilidade: qual sinal está ativo).

beta.title: Beta
beta.description: Slope: cov(x, y) / var(x) over aligned daily returns (engine beta).

alpha.title: Alpha
alpha.description: Intercept in DAILY decimal-return units: mean_y - beta * mean_x, derived from the engine beta (NOT annualized).

r.title: R
r.description: Pearson correlation of the aligned returns (-1..1).

n_points.title: N Points
n_points.description: Number of aligned daily return pairs.

RegressionOut.title: RegressionOut
RegressionOut.description: OLS regression of y on x over the aligned daily returns.

ReverseLookupFundExposure.title: ReverseLookupFundExposure
ReverseLookupFundExposure.description: Fund/series exposure to a requested CUSIP from local N-PORT holdings.

ReverseLookupInstitution.title: ReverseLookupInstitution
ReverseLookupInstitution.description: Institutional manager holding a requested CUSIP.

contribution.title: Contribution
contribution.description: Fraction of TOTAL portfolio risk (decimal fraction; all contributions sum to 1), evaluated at the effective initial weights.

RiskContributionOut.title: RiskContributionOut
RiskContributionOut.description: One asset's share of total portfolio risk (CTR convention).

name.title: Name
name.description: Portfolio name; same rules as POST /portfolios.

SaveRequest.title: SaveRequest
SaveRequest.description:
Body for POST /builder/save — persist a proposal as a real portfolio.

``quantity = weight * notional_usd / price`` per position (rounded to
4 decimals), where price is the fill price when given, else the
reference spot/NAV. The stored ``acq_price`` is the reference price for
basis='reference', or ``(fill_price*qty + commission)/qty`` (6 decimals)
for basis='executed'.

pricing_note.title: Pricing Note
pricing_note.default: Reference prices (spot/NAV) are for analysis; executed fills with commissions define real cost basis. Fund class NAV is proxied by the series NAV.

fill_price.title: Fill Price
fill_price.description: Actual execution price per share/unit; presence flips the position to basis='executed'.

commission.title: Commission
commission.description: Total commission paid on the fill (>= 0); requires fill_price.

trade_date.title: Trade Date
trade_date.description: Execution date of the fill; requires fill_price.

class_ticker.title: Class Ticker
class_ticker.description: Fund share-class ticker (fund assets only); must belong to the same fund instrument. Priced with the series NAV as a proxy.

SaveWeightIn.title: SaveWeightIn
SaveWeightIn.description:
One proposed weight to persist. Zero/near-zero weights should be
filtered out by the caller — a weight that rounds to quantity 0 is a 422.

F8.6b execution fields (all optional, retro-compatible):
- without ``fill_price`` the position is saved at the REFERENCE price
  (spot/NAV) with basis='reference';
- with ``fill_price`` the position is EXECUTED: quantity is sized at the
  fill, and the cost basis includes the commission;
- ``class_ticker`` (funds only) saves the position under a share-class
  ticker of the SAME fund instead of the representative one.

start_date.title: Start Date
start_date.description: First analyzed trading day (first date where ALL holdings have data within the requested window).

cash.title: Cash
cash.description: Uninvested cash balance, in currency units.

frequency.title: Frequency
frequency.description: Grid of ALL emitted line series: daily, or weekly (W-FRI last-of-week) when the window exceeds the daily bounding threshold. Statistics stay daily.

ScenarioParams.title: ScenarioParams
ScenarioParams.description: Echo of the resolved scenario parameters.

ScenarioRequest.title: ScenarioRequest
ScenarioRequest.description:
Historical replay of a persisted portfolio over [start_date, end_date].

Replay semantics: the portfolio's CURRENT quantities (and current cash)
are held fixed over the whole window — "what would this portfolio have
done over that period?", not a reconstruction of past trades.

nav_cash.title: Nav Cash
nav_cash.description: Stacked value series in currency units: one per position, plus a constant "CASH" series when cash > 0, plus "TOTAL" (positions + cash).

weights_percent.title: Weights Percent
weights_percent.description: Weight evolution as decimal fractions (0.5 = 50%, the frontend formats to 0-100): one per position, plus "CASH" when cash > 0. Rows sum to 1 across series per date. No "TOTAL" series (it would be constant 1).

asset_performance.title: Asset Performance
asset_performance.description: Cumulative return rebased to 0.0 at the window start, decimal fractions: one per position, plus "TOTAL" (cash-inclusive portfolio).

histogram.description: Histogram of the portfolio's DAILY returns (cash-inclusive total).

ScenarioResponse.title: ScenarioResponse
ScenarioResponse.description:
Render-ready scenario payload — historical replay of a persisted portfolio.

The portfolio's CURRENT quantities are held fixed (buy-and-hold) over the
window; uninvested cash is a constant. All series share the same date grid
(daily, or W-FRI weekly when bounded — see ``params.frequency``). The
backend computes ALL finance; the frontend only draws.

max_return.description: Best daily return and its date.

min_return.description: Worst daily return and its date.

annualized_volatility.title: Annualized Volatility
annualized_volatility.description: Annualized volatility of daily returns, decimal fraction (0.25 = 25%).

var_95.title: Var 95
var_95.description: Historical 1-day VaR at 95% as a POSITIVE decimal fraction.

var_99.title: Var 99
var_99.description: Historical 1-day VaR at 99% as a POSITIVE decimal fraction.

sharpe_ratio.title: Sharpe Ratio
sharpe_ratio.description: Annualized Sharpe ratio of the cash-inclusive total's daily returns at the canonical 4% risk-free rate (unitless).

sortino_ratio.title: Sortino Ratio
sortino_ratio.description: Annualized Sortino ratio (Target Downside Deviation denominator) of the cash-inclusive total's daily returns at the canonical 4% risk-free rate (unitless).

ScenarioStatistics.title: ScenarioStatistics
ScenarioStatistics.description:
Typed statistics rail of the scenario — computed on DAILY data even when
the line series are weekly-bounded. NAV figures include cash; returns are
daily simple returns of the cash-inclusive total value.

name.title: Name
name.description: Screen name; 1..80 characters after trimming, unique across the installation.

ScreenOut.title: ScreenOut
ScreenOut.description: One screen with its filters (position order).

name.title: Name
name.description: New screen name (same rules as on create).

points.title: Points
points.description: [date, value] points; the value scale is documented on the field that carries the series list.

StackedSeries.title: StackedSeries
StackedSeries.description: One series of a stacked chart: a position ticker, "CASH", or "TOTAL".

rolling_volatility.title: Rolling Volatility
rolling_volatility.description: [date, annualized volatility] points, decimal fractions (0.25 = 25%); in-range dates only, NaN warm-up rows dropped.

rolling_beta.title: Rolling Beta
rolling_beta.description: [date, beta vs benchmark] points (unitless); in-range, NaN rows dropped.

rolling_correlation.title: Rolling Correlation
rolling_correlation.description: [date, correlation vs benchmark] points (-1..1); in-range, NaN rows dropped.

StockAnalysisResponse.title: StockAnalysisResponse
StockAnalysisResponse.description:
Render-ready single-call payload for the stock analysis page.

The backend computes ALL finance; the frontend only draws. Every
fractional field is a decimal fraction (0.05 = 5%), never 0-100.
Rolling series are warmed up on a pre-range pad and then sliced to the
visible range with NaN rows dropped, so they cover the visible range
from (approximately) its first trading day.

window.title: Window
window.description: Trailing window length in TRADING days of returns (window + 1 closes are required).

end_date.title: End Date
end_date.description: Window end; defaults to the latest available trading day.

StockCorrelationRequest.title: StockCorrelationRequest
StockCorrelationRequest.description: Pairwise correlation of a portfolio's holdings over a trailing window.

matrix.title: Matrix
matrix.description: Row-major square matrix (-1..1); symmetric with unit diagonal.

as_of.title: As Of
as_of.description: Last trading day of the window (the latest date COMMON to all holdings, capped at the requested end_date).

StockCorrelationResponse.title: StockCorrelationResponse
StockCorrelationResponse.description: Pairwise Pearson correlation matrix of the holdings' daily returns.

StockFundHoldersResponse.title: StockFundHoldersResponse
StockFundHoldersResponse.description: Render-ready payload for the Holders "by fund" (N-PORT) tree view.

StockHolder.title: StockHolder
StockHolder.description: One institutional (13F) holder of the stock in the latest period.

StockHoldersResponse.title: StockHoldersResponse
StockHoldersResponse.description: Render-ready payload for the Holders tab.

TickerRef.title: TickerRef
TickerRef.description: Pseudo-asset reference: a plain instrument ticker.

UnexpandedPosition.title: UnexpandedPosition
UnexpandedPosition.description: Posição não atravessada — residual explícito no nível do portfólio.

UniverseSpecIn.title: UniverseSpecIn
UniverseSpecIn.description:
Filter + rank a slice of the FUND universe instead of listing assets.

The optimizer then runs over the resolved candidates (funds only, v1).
Candidates are restricted to funds that EACH have enough NAV history; the
cross-asset overlap requirement is still enforced on the resolved set. All
filter fields share the GET /funds vocabulary; ``rank_by``/``rank_dir``
pick the top ``max_assets`` of the matching set.

ViewConsistencyOut.title: ViewConsistencyOut
ViewConsistencyOut.description: He-Litterman 3-sigma alarm: are any views fighting the equilibrium?

WalkForwardRequest.title: WalkForwardRequest
WalkForwardRequest.description:
Walk-forward / OOS backtest over an explicit asset list.

The objective is RE-OPTIMIZED on each expanding TimeSeriesSplit train fold
and held out-of-sample over the following test fold. ``min_cvar`` (the
product default) is mu-free; BL ``views`` are intentionally NOT accepted
here (a backtest must not peek at user views formed with hindsight) —
backtests run the mu-free objectives only.

oos_curve.title: Oos Curve
oos_curve.description: Chained OOS NAV as [date, nav] points (decimal fraction NAV).

fold_boundaries.title: Fold Boundaries
fold_boundaries.description: First OOS date of each fold (plotLine markers).
